summary: GitHub repo connected via CLI. Deploy hook created. GitHub Actions workflow created. Production deploys working (verified via --force CLI deploy). Native auto-deploy on push not yet active — requires Vercel GitHub app authorization in Dashboard.
critical_fix_applied: api/app/data/lessons.json was stale copy — synced with backend/
critical_fix_details: api/ directory had independent copies of data files. Serverless function loads from api/app/data/lessons.json, not backend/app/data/lessons.json. All data files synced and confirmed working.
missing_steps: Authorize Vercel GitHub app in Vercel Dashboard for native auto-deploy on push
Go to Vercel Dashboard → python-full-course → Settings → Git → Connect Git Repository
Set production branch to master in Vercel project settings
Set VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL as GitHub Actions secret: gh secret set VERCEL_DEPLOY_HOOK_URL <url>
